teams were Limerick Young Irelanders
v. Kerry (hurling) and Keatings (Dublin)
y (football). In hurling, Limerick

‘The football match was keenly con-

scored. In the second half, however,
Dublin won by one foal three points:to
\Kerry’s one point. There was a decided
weakness in Kerry's scoring line.
